steps.title: Identify whether these nouns show possession
steps.content: The key signal is the grammatical function of each noun. Musicians is part of the subject with Joseph Kekuku, and audiences is the direct object of introduced. Neither noun shows possession of anything else.

steps.title: Apply the plural rule
steps.content:
Both nouns are simple plurals without possessive meaning, so neither takes an apostrophe: musicians and audiences.

Choices B and C incorrectly add apostrophes to both; choice D incorrectly makes only musicians possessive.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
